move2Acc 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Mapping acceleration data
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

acc()
Create a acc vector
acc_calibrate()
Convert raw acceleration values to physical units in an acc vector
acc_calibration() as_acc_calibration()
Create calibration functions for raw acceleration values
active_acc_colsets() active_mag_colsets() active_gyro_colsets()
Identify IMU columns present in a move2 object
as_acc()
Convert to acc
as_gyro()
Convert to gyro
as_mag()
Convert to mag
vedba() odba()
Calculate dynamic body acceleration (DBA) for an acc vector
duplicated_acc_rows() duplicated_mag_rows() duplicated_gyro_rows()
Identify rows of a move2 object with duplicated IMU data
eobs_default_specs()
Default e-obs tag configuration table
albatrosses() gulls()
move2Acc example datasets
is_acc() n_axis() is_uniform() bursts() `bursts<-`() freqs() `freqs<-`() starts() `starts<-`() burst_dur() n_samples() imu_units() is_gyro() is_mag()
Functions to explore an IMU vector
gyro()
Create a gyro vector
imu_colset()
Specify IMU data columns present in a move2 object
mag()
Create a mag vector
map_imu()
Apply a function to each element of an IMU vector
merge_imu()
Merge adjacent bursts in an IMU vector
movebank_acc_colsets() movebank_mag_colsets() movebank_gyro_colsets()
View standard Movebank IMU data column sets
peak_frequency()
Calculate the peak frequency per axis for bursts
plot_time()
Plot bursts over time
set_imu_units()
Set or convert units on IMU burst data
split_imu()
Split an IMU vector at regular intervals

Developed by Bart Kranstauber.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
